args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three orders affected by the duplicate-charge fault have been refunded in full: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api v3.4.1 deployed. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
